_doc: Known, intentional divergences between data/profile.json (canonical) and the LinkedIn export. Listed here so linkedin-check.mjs classifies them as 'accepted' instead of re-flagging them every run. Add an entry only when the divergence is a deliberate choice, with a note explaining why.

accepted.note: LinkedIn 'Integrations Consultant' was targeted at landing the Aura integration role. The repo carries the truer engineering framing ('Software Engineer (Contract)'). GitHub is canonical; LinkedIn stays as-is.
Same as Pioneer Works — 'Integrations Consultant' on LinkedIn, engineering framing in the repo.
